security_note: gateway=tercero que ve prompts/outputs y sostiene API key. Evaluar bajo Guardian de Secretos antes de enrutar creativo de cliente. Key NUNCA en localStorage (usar Vercel env / httpOnly).
fields_to_populate: cost_usd, latency_p50_s, quality_score, historical_success_rate se llenan desde logs de ejecucion (Regla 5).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image. The length of the prompt must be between 2 and 3000 characters.

width.description: Width of the output image. The value must be divisible by 64, eg: 128...512, 576, 640...2048.

height.description: Height of the output image. The value must be divisible by 64, eg: 128...512, 576, 640...2048.

num_images.description: Number of images generated in single request. Each number will charge separately
